name: yichen-grok-consult
description: Consult Grok or search public X posts from a GPT-led Codex conversation without switching the main model.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Grok or search X without switching models.
interface.longDescription: Keep GPT in control while using Grok as a read-only advisor or using the official Grok Build CLI for native X search with deterministic post-time decoding.
defaultPrompt: Ask Grok for an independent second opinion.
Search public X posts with Grok and verify their publication times.
Find X posts from a fixed date and exclude out-of-window results.
